terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
1. Agreement to Terms

By using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

2. Accounts

When you create an account with us, you must provide us with information that is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of the Terms, which may result in immediate termination of your account on our service.

3. Intellectual Property

The Service and its original content, features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of StudyMate and its licensors.

4. Contact Us

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at legal@studymate.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
1. Introduction

Welcome to StudyMate. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

2. Information We Collect

We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, and payment information when you register for an account, purchase a course, or contact us.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to provide, operate, and maintain our services, process your transactions, send you marketing communications, and respond to your comments and questions.

4. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@studymate.com.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.content:
1. General Policy

We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all our courses. If you are not satisfied with your purchase, you can request a full refund within 30 days of the purchase date.

2. How to Request a Refund

To request a refund, please contact our support team at support@studymate.com with your order details. Refunds will be processed within 5-7 business days.

3. Exceptions

No refunds will be provided for physical goods like textbooks once they have been shipped. Digital product bundles are non-refundable if a significant portion of the content has been downloaded or consumed.
